prompt: Cinematic photography style scene inside a tailoring workshop. A tailor is carefully adjusting a suit on a rigid mannequin that fits it perfectly, every detail tightly matched. In the background, several real people wearing the same suit look uncomfortable and ill-fitted, with awkward folds and tight areas. The mannequin stands perfectly posed while the real people appear natural but mismatched. Warm indoor lighting, realistic textures, shallow depth of field. Mood: subtle irony, precision versus mismatch. Composition: mannequin centered, real people slightly blurred in background. No text, no labels, no symbols, no diagrams, no charts.
metaphor: A perfectly tailored suit fits a mannequin exactly but looks awkward on real people, showing memorization without generalization.
